001/*
002 * Licensed to the Apache Software Foundation (ASF) under one or more
003 * contributor license agreements.  See the NOTICE file distributed with
004 * this work for additional information regarding copyright ownership.
005 * The ASF licenses this file to You under the Apache License, Version 2.0
006 * (the "License"); you may not use this file except in compliance with
007 * the License.  You may obtain a copy of the License at
008 *
009 *      http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0
010 *
011 * Unless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software
012 * distributed under the License is distributed on an "AS IS" BASIS,
013 * WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.
014 * See the License for the specific language governing permissions and
015 * limitations under the License.
016 */
017package org.apache.juneau.marshall.ini;
018
019import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.AssertionUtils.*;
020
021import java.io.*;
022import java.time.*;
023
024import org.apache.juneau.commons.bean.*;
025import org.apache.juneau.commons.collections.*;
026import org.apache.juneau.marshall.*;
027import org.apache.juneau.marshall.parser.*;
028import org.apache.juneau.marshall.stream.*;
029
030/**
031 * Parses INI-formatted text into POJO models.
032 *
033 * <p>
034 * Parses INI files (section/key-value format) into Java beans and maps.
035 *
036 * <h5 class='topic'>Media types</h5>
037 * <p>
038 * Consumes: <bc>text/ini, text/x-ini</bc>
039 *
040 * <h5 class='topic'>Value parsing</h5>
041 * <ul class='spaced-list'>
042 *    <li>Unquoted <c>null</c> → Java <jk>null</jk>
043 *    <li>Unquoted <c>true</c>/<c>false</c> → Boolean
044 *    <li>Unquoted numbers → Number (int, long, float, double as appropriate)
045 *    <li>Single-quoted strings (<c>'...'</c>) → String (with <c>''</c> unescaped to single quote)
046 *    <li>Values starting with <c>[</c> or <c>{</c> → Delegated to JSON parser
047 *    <li>ISO 8601 strings → Date, Calendar, or <c>java.time.*</c> when target requires it
048 *    <li>ISO 8601 duration strings → {@link Duration}
049 *    <li>Other unquoted tokens → String
050 * </ul>
051 *
052 * <h5 class='topic'>Sections</h5>
053 * <p>
054 * Sections (e.g. <c>[address]</c>) map to nested bean properties or Map properties.
055 * Section paths like <c>[employment/company]</c> map to deeply nested bean properties.
056 *
057 * <h5 class='section'>Example:</h5>
058 * <p class='bjava'>
059 *    <jc>// Parse INI into a bean</jc>
060 *    MyConfig <jv>config</jv> = IniParser.<jsf>DEFAULT</jsf>.parse(<jv>ini</jv>, MyConfig.<jk>class</jk>);
061 *
062 *    <jc>// Parse into a Map</jc>
063 *    Map&lt;String, Object&gt; <jv>map</jv> = IniParser.<jsf>DEFAULT</jsf>.parse(<jv>ini</jv>, Map.<jk>class</jk>, String.<jk>class</jk>, Object.<jk>class</jk>);
064 * </p>
065 *
066 * <h5 class='figure'>Example input:</h5>
067 * <p class='bini'>
068 *    <ck>name</ck> = <cv>Alice</cv>
069 *    <ck>age</ck> = <cv>30</cv>
070 *
071 *    <cs>[address]</cs>
072 *    <ck>street</ck> = <cv>123 Main St</cv>
073 *    <ck>city</ck> = <cv>Boston</cv>
074 *    <ck>state</ck> = <cv>MA</cv>
075 * </p>
076 *
077 * <h5 class='topic'>Limitations</h5>
078 * <p>
079 * Parsing into top-level collections, arrays, or scalar types is not supported.
080 * The target type must be a bean class or <c>Map&lt;String,?&gt;</c>.
081 *
082 * <h5 class='section'>Notes:</h5><ul>
083 *    <li class='note'>This class is thread safe and reusable.
084 *    <li class='note'>Values starting with <c>[</c> or <c>{</c> are delegated to the JSON parser.
085 * </ul>
086 *
087 * <h5 class='section'>See Also:</h5><ul>
088 *    <li class='link'><a class="doclink" href="https://juneau.apache.org/docs/topics/Ini">INI Basics</a>
089 * </ul>
090 */
091@SuppressWarnings({
092   "java:S110", "java:S115",
093   "resource" // Closeable resources are owned by the caller's parser session; Eclipse JDT @Owning warning is by design.
094})
095public class IniParser extends ReaderParser implements IniMetaProvider, RecordReadable {
096
097   private final java.util.concurrent.ConcurrentHashMap<ClassMeta<?>, IniClassMeta> iniClassMetas = new java.util.concurrent.ConcurrentHashMap<>();
098   private final java.util.concurrent.ConcurrentHashMap<BeanPropertyMeta, IniBeanPropertyMeta> iniBeanPropertyMetas = new java.util.concurrent.ConcurrentHashMap<>();
099
100   private static final String ARG_copyFrom = "copyFrom";
101
102   /**
103    * Builder for {@link IniParser}.
104    */
105   public static class Builder extends ReaderParser.Builder<Builder> {
106
107      private static final Cache<HashKey,IniParser> CACHE = Cache.of(HashKey.class, IniParser.class).build();
108
109      protected Builder() {
110         consumes("text/ini,text/x-ini");
111      }
112
113      protected Builder(Builder copyFrom) {
114         super(assertArgNotNull(ARG_copyFrom, copyFrom));
115      }
116
117      protected Builder(IniParser copyFrom) {
118         super(assertArgNotNull(ARG_copyFrom, copyFrom));
119      }
120
121      @Override
122      public IniParser build() {
123         return cache(CACHE).build(IniParser.class);
124      }
125
126      @Override
127      public Builder copy() {
128         return new Builder(this);
129      }
130   }
131
132   /** Default parser instance. */
133   public static final IniParser DEFAULT = new IniParser(create());
134
135   /**
136    * Creates a new builder.
137    *
138    * @return A new builder.
139    */
140   public static Builder create() {
141      return new Builder();
142   }
143
144   /**
145    * Constructor.
146    *
147    * @param builder The builder.
148    */
149   public IniParser(Builder builder) {
150      super(builder);
151   }
152
153   @Override
154   public IniBeanPropertyMeta getIniBeanPropertyMeta(BeanPropertyMeta bpm) {
155      if (bpm == null)
156         return IniBeanPropertyMeta.DEFAULT;
157      return iniBeanPropertyMetas.computeIfAbsent(bpm, k -> new IniBeanPropertyMeta(k, this));
158   }
159
160   @Override
161   public IniClassMeta getIniClassMeta(ClassMeta<?> cm) {
162      return iniClassMetas.computeIfAbsent(cm, k -> new IniClassMeta(k, this));
163   }
164
165   @Override
166   public IniParserSession.Builder createSession() {
167      return IniParserSession.create(this);
168   }
169
170   @Override
171   public Builder copy() {
172      return new Builder(this);
173   }
174
175   /**
176    * Convenience delegator that opens a {@link RecordReader} over the input using
177    * <b>default session arguments</b> (mirrors {@link #parse(Object, Class)}).
178    *
179    * <p>
180    * The real implementation lives on {@link IniParserSession#parseRecords(Object)}.  Callers
181    * that need request-derived configuration (locale, timezone, schema, swaps) should call
182    * {@link #createSession()} and invoke {@link IniParserSession#parseRecords(Object)} on the
183    * built session instead.
184    *
185    * @param input The input.
186    * @return A new {@link RecordReader} cursor.
187    * @throws IOException If a problem occurred opening the underlying input.
188    */
189   @Override /* RecordReadable */
190   public RecordReader parseRecords(Object input) throws IOException {
191      return ((RecordReadable) getSession()).parseRecords(input);
192   }
193
194   @Override /* RecordReadable */
195   public boolean isRecordStreaming() {
196      return false;
197   }
198}
